SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT alertResponseOptionID ,alertPromptID ,alertResponseType ,alertResponseOptionText ,displayCol ,sortOrder ,isActive ,hashKey FROM( SELECT AlertResponseOptionID AS alertResponseOptionID ,AlertPromptID AS alertPromptID , AlertResponseType AS alertResponseType ,AlertResponseOptionText AS alertResponseOptionText ,DisplayCol AS displayCol ,SortOrder AS sortOrder ,Active AS isActive ,hash(concat(IfNull(AlertResponseOptionID,"") ,"|",IfNull(AlertPromptID,"") ,"|",IfNull(AlertResponseType,""),"|",IfNull(AlertResponseOptionText,""),"|",IfNull(DisplayCol,""),"|",IfNull(SortOrder,""),"|",IfNull(Active,false))) AS hashKey FROM AlertResponseOption)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.alertResponseOptionID,"")=IfNull(t.alertResponseOptionID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN  UPDATE SET  alertResponseOptionID = s.alertResponseOptionID ,alertPromptID = s.alertPromptID ,alertResponseType = s.alertResponseType ,alertResponseOptionText = s.alertResponseOptionText ,displayCol = s.displayCol ,sortOrder = s.sortOrder ,isActive = s.isActive ,updatedDateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  INSERT(alertResponseOptionID ,alertPromptID ,alertResponseType ,alertResponseOptionText ,displayCol ,sortOrder ,isActive ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime , hashKey) VALUES ( s.alertResponseOptionID ,s.alertPromptID ,s.alertResponseType ,s.alertResponseOptionText ,s.displayCol ,s.sortOrder ,s.isActive, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, s.hashKey)
